source_status: TT handlers implemented for all current families
activation_boundary: SPE consumes TT transition identity and handler references; SPE still performs commit-time standing reconstruction.
fail_closed_rule: If a Commitment Candidate references a transition without a known TT transition id, implemented handler, fixture, or receipt schema, SPE must FAIL_CLOSED before standing can bind consequence.
non_claims: This manifest is a downstream consumer snapshot, not the canonical TT source.
This manifest does not redefine TT transition semantics.
This manifest does not grant commit-time permission.
